items.title: India supports UN membership for Palestine, says MEA
items.summary: India’s position on Palestine was apprised by Sripriya Ranganathan, a secretary at the External Affairs Ministry, during a ministerial meeting of the Palestine Donor Group, held...

items.title: Trump Will Let Ukraine Build Patriots. Ukraine Wants to Make Homegrown Missiles, Too.
items.summary: The Ukrainian firm Fire Point has produced weapons that hit Russian territory. Its next goal, developing an antimissile system, is a much bigger challenge, experts said.

items.title: Colombian national killed by ICE agent during operation in Maine
